'''Arbran''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Arbran system]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fleet under command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] once hid in this star to avoid detection by a passing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fleet.

{{Star-stub}}
